message:
feat(server,store): implement TCP server with mio and restructure sorted sets

TCP Server (fr-server):
- Non-blocking TCP listener with mio event loop
- Per-client connection state: read/write buffers, session management
- Connection lifecycle: accept, read, write, close with flow control
- AOF persistence loading at startup via --aof flag
- Query buffers with 1 MiB limit, write buffers with backpressure
- Graceful shutdown via QUIT command
- Add mio and log dependencies

Sorted Set Restructuring (fr-store):
- Replace HashMap-based SortedSet with dual BTreeMap/HashMap indexing
  using ScoreMember comparator for stable ordering
- O(log n) range operations (ZRANGEBYSCORE, ZCOUNT) vs O(n) iteration
- Store entries: HashMap → BTreeMap for deterministic key ordering
- Hash type: HashMap → BTreeMap for consistency
- Add deterministic pseudo-RNG (rng_seed, next_rand) for HRANDFIELD
- Improve GETRANGE boundary logic and string slicing
- Optimize keys_matching expiry reaping with retain()

Runtime Session Handling (fr-runtime):
- Add full_access flag to AclUser for explicit permission tracking
- Implement is_command_authorized() with per-user ACL checks
- Export new_session() and swap_session() for multi-client auth
- Add drain_pending_pubsub() for pub/sub message delivery
- Define MAX_COMMAND_ARITY (1MB) and COMMAND_TIME_BUDGET_MS (5000)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
